title: Trapezoid Area Calculator - Calculate Trapezoid Area
description: Free trapezoid area calculator. Calculate the area of a trapezoid using parallel sides (bases) and height.
keywords: trapezoid area calculator, area of trapezoid, trapezoid formula, trapezium calculator
intro: Calculate the area of a trapezoid. Enter the two parallel sides (bases) and the height.

faq.q: What is the formula for trapezoid area?
faq.a: Area = ½ × (base₁ + base₂) × height. The two bases are the parallel sides of the trapezoid.

faq.q: What is the difference between a trapezoid and a parallelogram?
faq.a: A trapezoid has exactly one pair of parallel sides. A parallelogram has two pairs of parallel sides (and is a special case of a trapezoid).
